_meta.author: bundui
_meta.title: Magnetic Button
_meta.description: A Magnetic Button is a UI component designed to enhance user interaction. When a user's cursor or touch input approaches the button, it subtly moves towards the user, simulating the effect of magnetic attraction. This interaction makes the button more enticing to click and adds a dynamic and engaging element to the user experience. This example was made with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion.
